inputs.label: Radial Load (Fr)
inputs.businessContext: The radial force acting on the bearing

inputs.label: Axial Load (Fa)
inputs.businessContext: The axial force acting on the bearing

inputs.label: Radial Factor (X)
inputs.businessContext: Radial load factor from bearing tables

inputs.label: Axial Factor (Y)
inputs.businessContext: Axial load factor from bearing tables

inputs.label: Dynamic Load Rating (C)
inputs.businessContext: Basic dynamic load rating of the bearing

inputs.label: Life Exponent (p)
inputs.businessContext: Exponent for life formula: 3 for ball bearings, 10/3 for roller bearings

inputs.label: Rotational Speed (n)
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed of the bearing in revolutions per minute
